user_request: The GEDCOM has a FAMC pointer from this child to a family. Add the father as the biological father.

research_contract.question: What is the nature of the parent-child link asserted by FAMC?

source_material: INDI @I3@ has FAMC @F1@; @F1@ has HUSB @I1@ and WIFE @I2@ and CHIL @I3@. No PEDI or ADOP tag.
expected_behaviors: Records the link as a tree assertion with relationship nature unspecified.
Explains FAMC does not distinguish biological / adoptive / step parentage without more tags.
Asks for or seeks evidence before asserting biological parenthood.
forbidden_behaviors: Asserts a proven biological father from the FAMC link alone.
Silently converts an unspecified link to biological parentage.
